description_long: This is a tall, four-tiered celebration cake with a white and light blue color scheme, featuring a cartoonish human figure topper wearing glasses and brown hair, standing on the topmost tier. Each tier is decorated with white icing drips and blue accents, and the cake is adorned with small blue and white flags, likely representing a national or festive theme. The front of the cake displays the message 'PILI FELIZ CUMPLEAÑOS' in blue letters, indicating it is a birthday cake. The cake sits on a round, flat, silver-colored base, providing stability and a clean presentation. The overall design is playful and festive, with a strong emphasis on character and national pride. The cake appears to be made of traditional cake materials, with visible fondant or buttercream icing and edible decorations.
description: A four-tiered, white and blue birthday cake with a cartoon figure topper, blue and white flags, and a festive message, displayed on a silver base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon figure topper, blue and white flags, and the 'PILI FELIZ CUMPLEAÑOS' message.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered tiers, flag decorations, and the profile of the figure topper.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the figure topper and symmetrical flag placement, no visible message.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cake's tiered structure and flag decorations, with the figure topper in profile.
